name: A3 · Weekly fundraising report → Nur (cron + Claude)
_doc: Importable n8n scaffold showing the cron+LLM digest pattern. Every Monday: query Supabase for the week's fundraising metrics, have Claude format a tight report, email/WhatsApp Nur. Internal-only, no human gate. Configure Supabase + Anthropic + email credentials in n8n's credential store.

parameters.query:
select
  (select coalesce(sum(amount),0) from donations where status='succeeded' and donated_at >= now() - interval '7 days') as raised_week,
  (select coalesce(sum(amount),0) from donations where status='succeeded' and date_trunc('month',donated_at)=date_trunc('month',now())) as raised_mtd,
  (select count(*) from donors where first_gift_at >= now() - interval '7 days') as new_donors_week,
  (select count(distinct donor_id) from donations where is_recurring) as recurring_donors,
  (select count(*) from donors where status='lapsed') as lapsed,
  (select name from campaigns where status='live' order by raised_amount desc limit 1) as top_campaign;

values.content: You write a tight weekly fundraising digest for Nur (founder). Plain, scannable, no fluff. Lead with the one number that matters, then bullets, then one suggested action. Under 150 words.
=Metrics for the week: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}. Write the digest.

parameters._note: Send via email (info@sinan.agency / tech@nisria.co) or a WhatsApp node. Subject: 'Nisria — weekly fundraising digest'.
parameters.subject: Nisria — weekly fundraising digest
